diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,129 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point class that extends HonoBase and configures a default router using SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: Primary export file providing the main Hono class with built-in routing configuration
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono class providing core functionality without router implementation, supports middleware, request handling, and response composition
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, ExecutedContext, Context, HonoRequest, Methods, composed, ComposedHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedMethodError, UnsupportedMediaType, InvalidBody
+- Simple note: Abstract base class defining core request/response lifecycle with compose and path utilities
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that exports PatternRouter from the router module
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper for exporting PatternRouter
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter class implementing regex-based pattern matching for routes with method patterns like `/:id`, `/*`, and custom regex patterns
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, UnsupportedPathError, method, path, parts, match, pattern, exec, handlers, routeMethod
+- Simple note: Matches paths at runtime using compiled regex from route definitions, supports named parameters and wildcards
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that exports LinearRouter from the router module
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper for exporting LinearRouter
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter class implementing linear traversal of sorted routes, attempts all routes in order and collects matches
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, emptyParams, UnsupportedPathError, method, path, parts, route, split, star, insert, handlers, match, result, len, i, j, res, params
+- Simple note: No precompilation, tries each route in sorted order on every match, may be slower for complex route trees
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter from the router module
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Exports reg-exp-router implementations including production-ready PreparedRegExpRouter
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter class that preprocesses routes and builds compiled regex matchers from route definitions for runtime matching
+- Namesnoticed: RegExpRouter, HandlerData, ParamIndexMap, StaticMap, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, Matcher, MatcherMap, PATH_ERROR, buildRegExp, match, insert, clearWildcardRegExpCache, getParamNames, trie, routesWithStaticPathFlag, handlerData, staticMap, routes, paramCounter, paramAssoc, keys, handlerMap, index, regexp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, buildAllMatchers, matchers
+- Simple note: Two-phase approach - build matcher during add(), use compiled regex during match() for fast lookup
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matcher data structure and matching logic for reg-exp-router, combines regex, handler data, and static match map
+- Names noticed: HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam, paramCount, paramIndexMap, keys, matchers, match, staticMap, regex, groups, indices, captureIndex, paramResult, matchIndex, indexReplacement, paramReplacement, indexArr, name
+- Simple note: Returns [RegExp, handlerData[][], staticMatchObject] for fast path/static path lookup
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter for production where routes are known ahead of time, pre-serializes matcher data for zero-payload responses
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, matcher, match, handlers, staticMap, path, method, METHOD_NAME_ALL, all, key, serialize, initParams, build, router
+- Simple note: Builds all matchers at startup for static routes, supports middleware and prepared response caching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class representing nodes in the trie used by RegExpRouter to organize routes for regex compilation
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, compareKey, label, labelReg, labelRegExp, labelIndex, onlyWildcard, onlyWildcardReg, onlyWildIndex, tailWildcard, tailWildcardReg, tailWildIndex, insert, tokens, groups, mark, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, pathSegments, indexReplacement, paramReplacement, tokensLen, loop, i
+- Simple note: Builds path trees with labels and wildcards, compares token types for proper sort order in regex
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class that builds complete regex expression from path tree including param and index replacement maps
+- Names noticed: Trie, ReplacementMap, ParamAssocArray, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, tokens, pathSegments, label, mark, loop, i, tokensLen, token, tokens, tokenLen, label, isLabel, isWildcard, isTail, labelIndex, labelReg, isLabelIndex, labelRegIndex, labelRegExp, labelIndex, loop
+- Simple note: Walks path tree nodes and builds regex with groups and indices for capturing named parameters
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that exports SmartRouter from the router module
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper for exporting SmartRouter
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter implements hybrid routing with multiple nested routers, uses lazy compilation and fallback mechanism
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, unsupportedPathError, MessageMatcherIsAlreadyBuilt, routers, routes, add, match, len, i, res, router, routes, match, unsupportedPathError, continue, fatalError, name, activeRouter
+- Simple note: Tries cached routers first, rebuilds with matching routes when needed, delegates to active router on second match
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel export file that exports TrieRouter from the router module
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper for exporting TrieRouter
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter class implementing tree-based routing with pattern matching, uses tree structure from add for efficient search
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert, path, results, match, search, method, node
+- Simple note: Tree-based matching on all routes added, exact prefix match required, handles optional parameters with trailing slash check
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class representing nodes in TrieRouter's tree based routing structure with insert/search functionality
+- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, insert, method, path, handler, curNode, parts, match, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, pattern, insertMethod, patternIndex, insertParams, insertScore, search, match, matchMethod, matchNode, matchPath, matchPath, matchPathMethod, matchHandler, res, handlers, params, len, i, cur, curChildren, curMethod, curNodeName, curScore, matchNodeName, matchHandler, matchScore, curParams, insertScore, matchParams, insertParams, matchParam, matchScore, params, method
+- Simple note: Tree structure where insert creates tree and search traverses from root matching segments, handles path prefix matching
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Common test suite for all routers providing shared test cases and routing helpers
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, Match, getSuiteHierarchy, suite, name, skip, router, match, beforeEach, task, suiteHierarchy, suites, name, router, match, skip, runTest, describe, async, it, expect, res, length, handler, params, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, TrailingSlash, Star, Multiple, IncludingSlashes, URLPattern, MethodCaseSensitive, CustomRouteMethods, MethodPriority
+- Simple note: Provides standardized test runner for testing common cases across all router implementations
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter covering basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, multiple handlers, priority, and path matching
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, runTests, UnsupportedPathError, Methods, test, multiMatch, params, handler, skip, reason, Basic, Usage, ReservedWords, Complex, Multiple, handlers, Priority, CustomRouteMethods, MethodPriority, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, Multiple, TrailingSlash, SkipPart, includePrefix, includeStar
+- Simple note: Verifies PatternRouter handles regex patterns, named params, wildcards, method matching, and multiple handler priority
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter covering basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, trailing slash, multiple matches, custom methods, and skip cases
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, runTests, UnsupportedPathError, Methods, test, multiMatch, params, handler, skip, reason, Basic, Usage, ReservedWords, Complex, Multiple, handlers, Priority, CustomRouteMethods, MethodPriority, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, Multiple, TrailingSlash, SkipPart, includePrefix, includeStar
+- Simple note: Tests linear router with route sorting by priority, validates that routes are tried in order and first match wins
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Comprehensive tests for RegExpRouter covering build matcher, static routes, wildcard support, named parameters, complex patterns, error cases, and match functionality
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, insert, getParamNames, buildAllMatchers, match, staticMap, matcher, method, path, PATH_ERROR, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, Wildcard, Star, Multiple, handlers, Priority, CustomRouteMethods, MethodPriority, buildParams, ParamAssoc, include, includeWith, includeWithSpecial, includeWithOptional, TrailingSlash, SkipPart, match, clearCache, getMatcher, clearCacheAndReset
+- Simple note: Tests full reg-exp-router lifecycle from route insertion through matcher building to runtime matching with static maps
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter covering basic usage, multiple routers, fallback behavior, active router selection, and error cases
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, trie, insert, test, runTest, runTests, BasicUsage, Multiple, routers, fallback, ActiveRouter, ActiveRouter, CustomRouteMethods, MethodPriority, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, Multiple, handlers, Priority, TrailingSlash, SkipPart, includePrefix, includeStar, includePath, includePath, multiple
+- Simple note: Tests SmartRouter cascading multiple routers, verifies fallback mechanism, tracks active router based on match depth
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter covering basic routing, named parameters, wildcards, multiple handlers, optional parameters, and complex path matching
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, runTests, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, Multiple, handlers, Priority, CustomRouteMethods, MethodPriority, BasicUsage, ReservedWords, Complex, Multiple, TrailingSlash, SkipPart, match, includePrefix, includeStar, includePath, includePath, match, includeStar, match, includePath, includeStar, match, includePath, includeStar, match
+- Simple note: Verifies TrieRouter prefix matching, named param extraction, score-based handler selection, and wildcard handling
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter Node class covering root node, insert operations, search operations, parameter handling, and tree structure
+- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, emptyParams, ROOT, insert, RootNode, insert, search, search, get, get, post, Basic, Usage, NamePath, NamePath, insert, NamePath, NamePath, insert, insert, insert, name, path, insert, id, id, id, NamePath, insert, NamePath, insert, name, insert, insert, insert, insert, name, insert, insert, insert
+- Simple note: Tests Node.insert and Node.search methods for tree operations including path segment matching and parameter collection
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, sr
